Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The True Shape of Io's Steeple Mountain 62 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs 56 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Vector Meson Dominance 38 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac 132 upvotes, 20 comments
  5. What Category Theory Teaches Us About DataFrames 33 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Significant progress made on Xbox 360 recompilation 128 upvotes, 25 comments
  7. Google releases Gemma 4 open models 1540 upvotes, 418 comments
  8. George Goble has died 153 upvotes, 32 comments
  9. NHS staff refusing to use FDP over Palantir ethical concerns 90 upvotes, 21 comments
  10. Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents 543 upvotes, 187 comments
  11. JSON Canvas Spec (2024) 115 upvotes, 32 comments
  12. C89cc.sh – standalone C89/ELF64 compiler in pure portable shell 138 upvotes, 41 comments
  13. Maze Algorithms (1997) 63 upvotes, 16 comments
  14. LinkedIn is searching your browser extensions 1773 upvotes, 719 comments
  15. Show HN: European alternatives to Google, Apple, Dropbox and 120 US apps 247 upvotes, 89 comments
  16. Decisions that eroded trust in Azure – by a former Azure Core engineer 860 upvotes, 366 comments
  17. Artemis II's toilet is a moon mission milestone 262 upvotes, 114 comments
  18. Good ideas do not need lots of lies in order to gain public acceptance (2008) 274 upvotes, 120 comments
  19. Switzerland hosts 'CERN of semiconductor research' 20 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Tailscale's new macOS home 481 upvotes, 235 comments
  21. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 45 upvotes, 17 comments
  22. 'Fatal decision': EU slammed for caving to US pressure on digital rules 34 upvotes, 13 comments
  23. ESP32-S31: 320MHz 2C RV32IMAFCP+CLIC, 512KB SRAM, GbE, 802.11ax, 61 GPIO 75 upvotes, 41 comments
  24. H.264 Streaming Fees: What Changed, Who's Affected, and What It Means 18 upvotes, 6 comments
  25. Show HN: Home Maker: Declare Your Dev Tools in a Makefile 66 upvotes, 39 comments
  26. Cursor 3 443 upvotes, 338 comments
  27. OpenAI Acquires TBPN 215 upvotes, 176 comments
  28. Proton Meet Isn't What They Told You It Was 119 upvotes, 104 comments
  29. Intel Assured Supply Chain Product Brief 3 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. ParadeDB (YC S23) Is Hiring Database Internal Engineers (Rust) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:00pm, 3 April 2026. Source here.
